archive_data.question_text: Which country did India beat in the Thomas Cup Finals in 2022?

explanation.english: India defeated Indonesia 3-0 in the finals of the Thomas Cup 2022 held in Bangkok, Thailand, to win their first-ever Thomas Cup title.
explanation.tanglish: India 2022 Thomas Cup finals-la Bangkok, Thailand-la Indonesia-ai vethu mudhaladave champion aaganar.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following is a famous performer of Kalbelia dance form?

explanation.english: Gulabo Sapera is a renowned folk dancer from Rajasthan who has popularized the Kalbelia dance form, which is included in UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list.
explanation.tanglish: Gulabo Sapera Rajasthan-ku sencholiya prasiddha Kalbelia aattangara, idhu UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage list-il idam petrathu.

archive_data.question_text: नलवाड़ी मेला किस भारतीय राज्य में आयोजित किया जाता है?

explanation.english: Nalwadi Mela is a famous annual fair organized in the Yamunanagar district of Haryana state.
explanation.tanglish: Nalwadi Mela Haryana rajya Yamunanagar district-la varushathamum nadappikkappadum oru prasiddha theru.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is an example of a Western coast port?

explanation.english: Kandla port is located in the Kutch district of Gujarat on the western coast of India, while the others are located on the eastern coast.
explanation.tanglish: Kandla bandar India vada kadal karaiya irukkum Gujarat state Kutch district-la ullathu, matra ellam kilakku kadal karaiyil ullana.

archive_data.question_text: रथ सप्तमी का सांस्कृृतिक उत्सव मुख्य रूप से भारत के किस राज्य में मनाया जाता है?

explanation.english: Rath Saptami is a Hindu festival dedicated to Lord Surya, mainly celebrated in Andhra Pradesh and other South Indian states with great devotion.
explanation.tanglish: Rath Saptami Surya Bhagavan-ku samarpitha oru Hindu vizha, idhu Andhira Pradesh matrum daksina Indian states-la perum pakkuvaga kondadakkappadum.

archive_data.question_text: Who has the power to grant pardons?

explanation.english: According to Article 72 of the Indian Constitution, the President of India has the power to grant pardons, reprieves, respites or remissions of punishment.
explanation.tanglish: Indian Constitution Article 72 prakaram, India President-ku thandanaiyal irundhu vimadukku alikkum adhikaram undu.

archive_data.question_text: The aim of 'Poorna Swaraj' was adopted during the 1929 session of the _________ Congress.

explanation.english: The Lahore session of the Indian National Congress in December 1929, presided over by Jawaharlal Nehru, adopted the resolution demanding 'Poorna Swaraj' or Complete Independence.
explanation.tanglish: 1929 December Indian National Congress Lahore session-la Jawaharlal Nehru adhyakshathuvathil Poorna Swaraj thirumanam eduthukkappattathu.
